dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3830 IS: Tailored Regulatory Updates for Supervisory Testing Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Budd (for himself, Mr. Kim, Mr. Kennedy, and Ms. Alsobrooks) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Deposit Insurance Act to permit Federal banking agencies to examine qualifying insured depository institutions with under $6,000,000,000 in total assets not less than once during each 18-month period, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Tailored Regulatory Updates for Supervisory Testing Act of 2026 or the TRUST Act of 2026.

section.header: Modification of examination cycle thresholds for well-managed institutions
section.text: Section 10(d) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act (12 U.S.C. 1820(d)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (4)(A), by striking $3,000,000,000 and inserting $6,000,000,000; and
in paragraph (10), by striking $3,000,000,000 and inserting $6,000,000,000.
